Our Services

Reliable property services, tailored for you

From tenant sourcing to full management — straightforward, transparent, and local.

Residential Lettings

Expert lettings and tenant sourcing with thorough vetting processes to find reliable, long-term tenants for your property.

  • Tenant sourcing & advertising
  • Comprehensive referencing
  • Lease agreement preparation
  • RTB registration assistance
  • Move-in coordination

Full Property Management

Complete management and inspections for your entire portfolio. We handle the day-to-day so you don't have to.

  • Monthly rent collection
  • Arrears monitoring & follow-up
  • Contractor coordination
  • Inspection scheduling
  • Ongoing tenancy support

RTB Compliance

Ensuring full regulatory adherence with up-to-date legislative tracking. Stay compliant without the complexity.

  • Tenancy registration management
  • Rent review compliance
  • Notice period management
  • Legislative update advisory
  • Documentation control

Maintenance Coordination

Efficient repairs and support with full issue tracking, from initial report to completion verification.

  • 24/7 issue reporting via portal
  • Vetted contractor dispatch
  • Competitive quote management
  • Real-time job tracking
  • Completion verification

Ready to simplify your property management?

Contact Us
